data.body:
G3 child-coverage audit (parent f89d-e54d-203d-4ee0 × THIS child fe57 "Hermetic-but-honest Jira fixtures + verified fake client served through the production path"), 4-bucket per parent acceptance/success criterion, cross-checked against the WHOLE sibling roster (2359/33d0/59ef/822a/8937/fe57). VERDICT: clean pairing — no G3 coverage finding attributable to this child; no parent criterion left uncovered across the roster.

OWNED / CONTRIBUTED by THIS child (fe57 = the FOUNDATION: scrubbed real-Jira payload fixtures under tests/fixtures/jira/ + FakeAcliClient served through the production fetcher enrichment with NO shape massaging + live-gated capture/scrub script + re-capture doc; siblings 8937, 59ef, 822a all declare depends_on fe57):
- Parent AC "One round-trip contract test exercises fetcher → snapshot → differs → applier through the production path, using fixtures derived from real Jira payloads" → fe57 OWNS the "fixtures derived from real Jira payloads" half: fe57 AC1 (tests/fixtures/jira/*.json hold scrubbed real Jira payloads for search+comment+issuelinks+parent; no tokens/emails/accountIds) + AC2 (FakeAcliClient serves them through the production fetch_snapshot enrichment with NO shape transformation) + AC4 (consumed only via the production code path; no test hand-reshapes). The round-trip TEST itself is correctly delegated to keystone 8937 (8937 AC3, which declares depends_on fe57; fe57 scopes the contract test OUT). FULLY as a pairing (fixtures → fe57; test → 8937).
- Parent SC "Producer (fetcher + enrichment) and consumers (differs/appliers) cannot drift on snapshot shape without a test failing" → fe57 OWNS the honest-input half: real-payload fixtures served unmassaged through the production fetch_snapshot enrichment remove the bug-0ee6/3f04 root cause (differs fed hand-built shapes the real fetcher never emits). Complemented by 8937 (schema SSOT + joint round-trip) and 59ef (verified-fake fidelity). CONTRIBUTED.
- Parent SC "New tests assert behavior/contract; the suite stays lean; zero change-detector tests added" → fe57 AC3 (live-gated capture + documented re-capture cadence so fixtures stay honest and do not rot into change-detectors). CONTRIBUTED.

DELEGATION — parent criteria fe57 does NOT own are correctly assigned to named siblings; fe57's declared OUT items (the contract test → story B/8937; the verified-fake honesty check → story C/59ef) are consistent with the roster:
- AC "SSOT snapshot-entry schema module" → 8937 AC1.
- AC "test validates fetcher's snapshot output vs schema" → 8937 AC2.
- AC "test validates each differ's snapshot reads vs schema" → 8937 AC1 (schema covers every field the differs read) + AC3 (round-trip drives inbound_differ + outbound_differ reads against the schema-validated snapshot).
- AC "Outbound application collapsed to a single production path" + AC "retired outbound applier path deleted" + SC "outbound exercised through the production code path, not a parallel dead path" → 33d0 (closed; AC1 + parity-before-delete gate).
- AC "outbound sub-op telemetry (links/comments/labels_applied) surfaced in the structured batch outcome" + AC "computed > 0 && applied == 0 fails loudly, after the warn-first rollout" + SC "silent sub-op no-op fails a test/canary" → 2359 (closed; AC1/AC2/AC3, depends_on 33d0).
- AC "bidirectional comment/link/parent round-trip asserted hermetically through the production path" + AC "every expected-bug probe guard converted to fail-when-the-gap-closes" + SC "bidirectional round-trips asserted; no probe encodes a bug as expected" → 822a (closed; AC1/AC2/AC3, depends_on fe57).
- AC "A documented anti-change-detector guardrail for reconciler tests is committed and referenced by new tests (owned by story B)" → 8937 (story B). The parent AC NAMES its owner verbatim; 8937 delivers it (description "Owns the epic's guardrail artifact …" + 8937 AC5 + committed docs/adr/0004-reconciler-snapshot-contract.md). Under the G3 ANTI-FP rule (a criterion covered-by-definition by a NAMED consumer counts), FULLY covered.

ANTI-FP / WITHDRAWAL (concur): the recurring "Parent AC6 documented anti-change-detector guardrail only PARTIALLY covered — no sibling produces a governing artifact / governs new tests" finding raised in this ticket's early audits is a FALSE POSITIVE and stays WITHDRAWN. It was raised against a paraphrased "governs new tests" wording that does not match the plan text; the actual parent AC explicitly names story B (= 8937) as owner and is delivered by 8937's description + AC5 + ADR-0004. fe57's own re-capture doc ("so fixtures stay honest and do not rot into change-detectors") is self-scoped to its fixtures and is consistent with that (not the governing artifact, which is correctly 8937's). The same false positive was already withdrawn across 2359/33d0/59ef/822a/8937; not re-filed.

4-bucket summary for this pairing:
- FULLY (fe57 owns its half; jointly complete): parent AC "round-trip contract uses fixtures derived from real Jira payloads" (fixtures → fe57; test → 8937).
- CONTRIBUTED: parent SC "producer/consumers cannot drift on snapshot shape" (honest-input/foundation half); parent SC "zero change-detector / lean suite" (re-capture cadence keeps fixtures from rotting).
- COVERED-BY-NAMED-SIBLING: SSOT schema + fetcher/differ validation + round-trip contract test (8937); applier collapse + retired-path deletion + production-path exercise (33d0); sub-op telemetry + silent-no-op canary (2359); bidirectional hermetic round-trip + probe de-encoding (822a); verified-fake fidelity (59ef); documented anti-change-detector guardrail (8937, story B — named owner).
- STRUCTURAL/AGGREGATE: parent AC "All six child stories are closed; the full reconciler suite is green" (all six closed).
- PARTIALLY / UNCOVERED: none.

No G3 coverage finding for this pairing. fe57's owned share (real-Jira fixtures + unmassaged FakeAcliClient through the production fetcher enrichment + live-gated capture/scrub script + re-capture doc) is the foundation three siblings (8937, 59ef, 822a) explicitly depend_on; the union of children covers every parent acceptance/success criterion, and no parent criterion is left uncovered by, or solely-and-uncovered on account of, this child.
